examples.vote_description: Financial Innovation and Technology for the 21st Century Act
examples.reason: Financial Innovation and Technology for the 21st Century Act (FIT21) — comprehensive crypto regulation that creates SEC/CFTC framework favorable to financial industry participation in digital assets.

examples.vote_description: Improving Interagency Coordination for Pipeline Reviews Act
examples.reason: Improving Interagency Coordination for Pipeline Reviews Act — streamlines federal review process for pipeline projects, directly benefiting oil and gas pipeline companies.

examples.vote_description: SUPPORT for Patients and Communities Reauthorization Act
examples.reason: SUPPORT for Patients and Communities Reauthorization Act — reauthorizes opioid treatment programs and community health services. Healthcare industry supports as it funds treatment programs and drives patient volume.
Expanding Access to Capital Act — package of bills reducing SEC regulations on capital formation, benefiting investment banks, brokerages, and small/mid-cap companies.

examples.vote_description: Do No Harm in Medicaid Act
examples.reason: Do No Harm in Medicaid Act — despite the friendly name, this bill CUTS Medicaid by restricting eligibility and reducing federal matching funds. Hospitals and healthcare providers oppose Medicaid cuts because they reduce patient volume and reimbursements.

highlights.issue: Universal background checks for gun purchases
Build a wall on the U.S.-Mexico border
Require permits to carry concealed guns
